hero.title: We design and build digital products that actually work
hero.description: No fluff, no buzzwords: just experience engineering and technical execution to drive real business growth.

services.title: So... what the f*** do you guys actually do?

num_1.title: UX & UI Design
num_1.description: We kill complexity. We create interfaces so intuitive your users won’t need a manual—just a reason to use your product.

num_2.title: Product Management
num_2.description: We prioritise what matters. We align your strategy with real goals, managing the product from the initial spark until it’s in the customer's hands.

num_3.title: CX Research & Audit
num_3.description: We find where you're losing money. We analyse user behaviour to strip away friction and uncover high-impact growth opportunities.

num_4.title: Digital Transformation
num_4.description: Modernising your business from top to bottom. From legacy systems to internal culture, we prime your structure for the digital age.

num_5.title: Software Development
num_5.description: Clean, scalable code. We build robust solutions (back and front) that won’t break the moment your business starts to scale.

customers.description: Surprisingly, yes. We work with leaders in Telco and IT, but the truth is, nobody is a saint when it comes to customer experience. If you’ve got a digital headache, we’re your team.

message.title: Tell us about the challenge
message.placeholder: what sort of mess are you in?

about.title: who we are
about.hero_text: We aren't your average agency. We’re a team of specialists obsessed with delivering digital products that hit the bottom line, not just the aesthetic.

rule_1.title: Real Partnership
rule_1.description_line1: Forget the cold client-vendor dynamic. We’re part of your team.
rule_1.description_line2: We work with total transparency and honesty. If something won’t work, we’ll tell you. We thrive on the challenge and commit to your long-term success.

rule_2.title: Profit-Led Design
rule_2.description_line1: Looking good is nice; billing well is better.
rule_2.description_line2: Every design decision we make targets a metric: higher conversion, better retention, or lower OPEX. If it doesn't add value, it doesn't get built.

rule_3.title: Simplicity Above All
rule_3.description_line1: We solve complex nightmares with simple solutions.
rule_3.description_line2: We manage the technical chaos internally so that, on the outside, your product feels like magic. Scalable, accessible, and friction-free.

case_study_01.title: Telecoms: Frictionless Service Activation
case_study_01.challenge: Technical complexity in activating convergent bundles (fibre, mobile, TV) was creating an insurmountable barrier for customers. The process was so convoluted that most users abandoned their registration midway, flooding the support centre with technical queries and complaints.
case_study_01.idea: We completely redesigned the purchase and activation experience (CX) by stripping away unnecessary steps. We implemented a modular architecture connected to real-time APIs that validate service provisioning instantly, allowing users to complete the entire process without external help.
case_study_01.outcome: We achieved a 45% increase in successful activations and a 12% uplift in ARPU (Average Revenue Per User) by making it easier for customers to add extra services during the flow.

case_study_02.title: Wealth Management: 100% Digital Onboarding
case_study_02.challenge: A private fund manager was stuck in an analogue loop of paper-based systems and manual signatures. This dragged out new client onboarding for weeks, leading to high churn rates among high-net-worth individuals who expected a much more agile experience.
case_study_02.idea: We executed a full-scale digital transformation of the contracting process. By integrating biometrics (e-KYC) and advanced digital signature systems, we created a 100% online, secure, and legally robust flow that allows clients to open an account in minutes.
case_study_02.outcome: We slashed account activation time by 95% (from weeks to under 48 hours) and saw a 41% increase in digital onboarding completion rates.

case_study_03.title: Enterprise SaaS: AI vs. Data Overload
case_study_03.challenge: System administrators were drowning in data-heavy dashboards that were nearly impossible to interpret. This cognitive overload led to critical service management errors and dangerously slow response times during major incidents.
case_study_03.idea: We redesigned the UX/UI and implemented a Generative AI layer. Instead of showing raw data, the system now summarises complex metrics into natural language, providing actionable insights and simplified commands to resolve issues the moment they arise.
case_study_03.outcome: We achieved a 38% reduction in critical operational errors and saved the internal teams 25% of the time previously spent resolving Tier-1 support issues.

case_study_04.title: Fintech: Collaborative Tax Ecosystem
case_study_04.challenge: Communication between businesses and accountants was a mess of emails, phone calls, and lost documents. This fragmentation caused constant tax filing delays and created a massive operational overhead for both parties.
case_study_04.idea: We built a digital ecosystem with a dual-interface approach (business vs. accountant). We implemented a 'single source of truth' that automates data ingestion and syncs tax status in real-time, ensuring everyone is working from the same, accurate set of books.
case_study_04.outcome: We reduced unnecessary document back-and-forth by 40% and improved tax filing efficiency by 30% for both SMEs and accounting firms.

case_study_05.title: Cybersecurity: 360° Shield for VIPs
case_study_05.challenge: High-net-worth individuals (HNWIs) had their digital identities and assets scattered across multiple vulnerable platforms. They lacked a unified system to monitor their personal security and sensitive documents in real-time.
case_study_05.idea: We developed a premium 'concierge-style' security application built on a Zero-Trust architecture. The system constantly supervises devices, network connections, and document integrity, proactively alerting the user to any potential identity threats.
case_study_05.outcome: We provided 100% visibility of the user's digital footprint and increased the response time to unauthorised access attempts by 60%.

case_study_06.title: B2B: Critical Infrastructure Security Framework
case_study_06.challenge: Large corporations and government bodies required a superior security posture that could leverage the operator's network intelligence. Off-the-shelf solutions weren't enough to protect their mission-critical infrastructure.
case_study_06.idea: We designed a holistic security framework that integrates carrier-grade network protection with an elite suite of defence services. We created a unified command centre to manage perimeter security and sovereign compliance at scale.
case_study_06.outcome: We reduced incident mitigation time by 55% and ensured full compliance with national security standards for large-scale public and private organisations.

cookies.title: 🍪 Cookies?
cookies.description: We use cookies to enhance your experience. By continuing to browse, you agree to our policy.

cookiePolicy.title: Cookie Policy
cookiePolicy.sec1_text: Cookies are small text files that websites store on your device to make the site work correctly, remember preferences, and analyze traffic.
cookiePolicy.sec2_text: At Room 714, we use technical cookies (essential) and third-party analytical cookies to understand how you interact with our site and improve our service.
cookiePolicy.sec4_text: You can revoke your consent at any time by clearing your browser cookies or using the settings button on our website.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: At Room 714, we take the protection of your personal data very seriously and strictly comply with GDPR regulations.
privacy.responsible_text: The entity responsible for the data collected through this website is Room 714.
privacy.purpose_text: We process the information you provide us for the following purposes:
purpose_items: Responding to inquiries sent via our contact email.
Analyzing website usage through cookies to enhance user experience.
Managing potential business and professional relationships.
privacy.rights_text: You may exercise your rights of access, rectification, erasure, and objection by sending an email to hello@room714.com.

terms.title: Terms & Conditions
terms.acceptance: Accessing and using this website grants you the status of user and implies full acceptance of these terms and conditions.
terms.ip_text: All website content (designs, text, logos, videos) is the exclusive property of Room 714 or its licensors. Total or partial reproduction is prohibited without prior authorization.
terms.use_text: The user agrees to use the content and services appropriately, refraining from illegal activities or actions that damage Room 714's systems or those of third parties.
terms.liability_text: Room 714 is not responsible for damages resulting from interferences, omissions, or computer viruses caused by factors outside the control of the website owner.
